accessTokenInactivityTimeoutSeconds.description: Timeout for inactive tokens in seconds

apiVersion.description: APIVersion defines the versioned schema of this representation of an object.

grantMethod.description: Method used to authorize client users (auto, prompt, or deny)

kind.description: Kind is a string value representing the REST resource this object represents.

redirectURIs.description: List of valid redirect URIs for the client

respondWithChallenges.description: If true, respond to 401 errors with a WWW-Authenticate challenge

scopeRestrictions.description: Restrictions on scopes the client can request
